oneOf.description: dest path: relative -> repo, ~/ or absolute -> host

path.description: dest path: relative -> repo, ~/ or absolute -> host

writeType.description: how the rendered body lands: overwrite (default: header + body) | mergeUpsert (env KEY=VALUE union under the existing dest)

skipAutoGeneratedHeader.description: drop the autogen header on the overwrite path (dests whose format forbids comments)

renderReferencedFiles.description: inline @-includes into the rendered body (overwrite path)

writeType.description: how the rendered body lands: overwrite (default: header + body) | mergeUpsert (env KEY=VALUE union under the existing dest)

skipAutoGeneratedHeader.description: drop the autogen header on the overwrite path (dests whose format forbids comments)

renderReferencedFiles.description: inline @-includes into the rendered body (overwrite path)

enabled.description: emit OTLP telemetry to the collector; default off; overridden by CHE_OTEL_ENABLED

endpoint.description: OTLP collector endpoint (host:port); default localhost:4317 (grpc) / localhost:4318 (http); overridden by CHE_OTEL_ENDPOINT

protocol.description: OTLP transport: grpc | http; default grpc; overridden by CHE_OTEL_PROTOCOL

metrics.description: export metrics; default on when enabled; overridden by CHE_OTEL_METRICS

logs.description: export che log lines as OTel logs; default on when enabled; overridden by CHE_OTEL_LOGS

traces.description: export spans for command/spec/profile/operation runs and external calls; default on when enabled; overridden by CHE_OTEL_TRACES

execIf.description: predicate expressions `<source>` or `<source> == <literal>`, sources builtin:*/env:*; empty: always

autoDiscover.description: run on bare che (nil: inherit spec options, then false: runs only via --profiles or include.profiles)

debug.description: print debug-level lines around this profile (nil: inherit spec options, then che level)

workingDirectory.description: the profile's load-ops source tree (empty: inherit spec options, then che level, then the checkout)

options.description: when the profile runs: autoDiscover opts in to bare-che runs, execIf predicates must ALL pass; debug/workingDirectory cascade (most nested wins)

ProfileRecipe.description: one profile block: options self-describe eligibility, include.profiles compose refs in order (local scalars, sourced {source, options, env}), include adds, exclude filters last and wins

source.description: <source>/<spec-file>.yml::<profile>: source @<giturl> (remote) or <dir> (local); bare <profile> for the local spec

env.description: envs exported around everything done for the referenced profile (sourced entries only)

oneOf.description: sourced profile ref: source is <source>/<spec-file>.yml::<profile>, options override its options, env overlays its run

skipSecrets.description: skip op:// secret resolution, render placeholders; overridden by the flag and env var

execIf.description: spec-level predicates: gate every profile of this spec (ANDed with each profile's own); spec-only

autoDiscover.description: default for profiles that don't set it

debug.description: default for profiles that don't set it

workingDirectory.description: the load-ops source tree (absolute, relative to the checkout, ~/, $VAR, env vars expanded); default the checkout itself; makeLinks/makeCopies/renderTemplates host sources resolve against it; home targeting is explicit via a $HOME dest rewrite; spec-only

validateSpec.description: how this spec's schema violations report (per-spec: each included spec honors its own); overridden by the flag and env var

dryRun.description: default dry-run mode: delta (changed dests) | all (every dest); overridden by the flag and env var

profiles.description: profiles to run (autoDiscover skipped, execIf still enforced); overridden by --profiles and CHE_PROFILE

skipRemoteRefs.description: skip sourced include.profiles refs; overridden by the flag and env var

otel.description: OTLP telemetry (metrics + logs) to a local collector; overridden by CHE_OTEL_* env

SpecOptions.description: reserved top-level options: block: spec-wide defaults (execIf gate, autoDiscover/debug/workingDirectory) + che knobs (validateSpec/dryRun/profiles/skipRemoteRefs/renderTemplates.skipSecrets); same shape as the user-config file

owner.description: dest owner user; empty: code default

ownerGroup.description: dest owner group; empty: code default

directories.description: the group's items, each inheriting the group's perms

owner.description: dest owner user; empty: code default

ownerGroup.description: dest owner group; empty: code default

files.description: the group's items, each inheriting the group's perms

makeCopies.description: drop matching copy items (source or dest)

renderTemplates.description: drop matching template items (source or dest)

excludeSet.description: subtractive glob filter, applied last, wins over every include (rich entries too)

source.description: source path (host sources workingDirectory-relative, repo-doc sources checkout-relative), or remote ref @<repo>//<path>[?ref=<ref>] (renderTemplates only, explicit dest required)

oneOf.description: dest paths: relative -> repo, ~/ or absolute -> host; omitted -> derived from the workingDirectory-relative source path

sed-style rewrite s<delim><pattern><delim><replacement><delim>[g] (Go regexp pattern, literal replacement so $HOME survives; g: every match, absent: first only), applied to the workingDirectory-relative dest path before host mapping (:-delimited is the blessed form; e.g. s:^_home:$HOME: targets the invoking user's home)
prefix-swap sugar <prefix>/**: with source <srcPrefix>/** it desugars to s:^<srcPrefix>:<prefix>: (e.g. dest $HOME/** with source _home/** targets home)

ctx.description: renderTemplates only: values exposed as the template's root context (.key)

oneOf.description: one source fanned out to explicit dests

profiles.description: profile refs composed depth-first before this profile's own payload: local profile name scalar, or {source, options, env} where source is <source>/<spec-file>.yml::<profile> locating a profile in another spec (its own checkout anchor)

makeLinks.description: symlink-op entries, workingDirectory-relative: glob string (dest derived 1:1) or {source, dest} dest rewrite (sed-style s:^_home:$HOME: or prefix-swap sugar {source: _home/**, dest: $HOME/**} to target home)

makeCopies.description: *.ontoHost.cp copy-op perm-groups, workingDirectory-relative sources; a glob source may carry a {source, dest} dest rewrite (sed-style s:^_home:$HOME: or prefix-swap sugar _home/** -> $HOME/**)

renderTemplates.description: *.tpl render-op perm-groups; local host sources workingDirectory-relative, repo-doc sources (repo dest) checkout-relative, or remote (@<repo>//<path>[?ref=<ref>], explicit dest required); glob and derived-dest forms are host sources; a glob source may carry a {source, dest} dest rewrite (sed-style s:^_home:$HOME: or prefix-swap sugar _home/** -> $HOME/**)

makeDirs.description: extra-dir perm-groups; each item one dir path (brace-expanded)

runScripts.description: script paths or globs, repo-relative, run in spec order

includeSet.description: additive payload: profile refs, makeLinks globs, makeCopies/renderTemplates/makeDirs perm-groups, runScripts globs

oneOf.description: glob over git-tracked files (brace-expanded), workingDirectory-relative, dest derived 1:1

sed-style rewrite s<delim><pattern><delim><replacement><delim>[g] (Go regexp pattern, literal replacement so $HOME survives; g: every match, absent: first only), applied to the workingDirectory-relative dest path before host mapping (:-delimited is the blessed form; e.g. s:^_home:$HOME: targets the invoking user's home)
prefix-swap sugar <prefix>/**: with source <srcPrefix>/** it desugars to s:^<srcPrefix>:<prefix>: (e.g. dest $HOME/** with source _home/** targets home)
source file or glob with a sed-style dest rewrite

owner.description: dest owner user; empty: code default

ownerGroup.description: dest owner group; empty: code default

ctx.description: group-level template context, merged under each item's ctx (item keys win)

options.description: group-level render options, merged under each explicit dest's options (dest-set fields win)

templates.description: the group's items, each inheriting the group's perms

env.description: environment exported around this spec's preparation and execution

sources.description: spec sources, each a <dir> (absolute, relative, ~/, $VAR) or @<giturl>

include.description: other specs composed into this one

title: che.yml
description: che spec: reserved keys options/env/include, every other top-level key defines a profile block
